en: Look, honey, the kids are exhausted. You are exhausted. There's absolutely nothing more that we can do in this airport.
ko: 자, 자기야, 아이들이 지쳤고, 당신도 지쳤어.

en: Now, I say we go over to Rob's, and that way we can call the police again, and they can get back to us.
Peter, Kevin is home all by himself. I'm not leaving here unless it's on an airplane.
Madam, we are doing everything we can.
Now, if you want to stay at the airport, maybe we can get you on standby.
It is a possibility that the seat will open up.
ko: 좌석이 열릴 가능성이 있어요. 알겠죠? 네, 기다릴게요.

en: I'm very sorry, but it is Christmas Eve.
Nothing available. May I help you get a hotel room in the city?
ko: 이용 가능한 게 없어요. 시내 호텔 방을 예약해 드릴까요?

en: Tomorrow afternoon, we can get you a flight to Chicago. I can't wait that long.
ko: 내일 오후에 시카고행 비행기를 예약해 드릴 수 있어요.

en: I'm terribly sorry, ma'am, but we're doing absolutely everything we can.
Go ahead. On your way. I'm sorry. Excuse me. You have places to go, people to see.
